headline: Built for Orb
subheadline: AI infrastructure to streamline usage-based billing and sales processes for scaling SaaS companies

challenges.title: Scaling sales team
challenges.desc: Orb faces rapid growth in San Francisco as a Series B startup, requiring efficient sales training tools to handle increasing demands. This leads to bottlenecks in equipping reps with the latest billing insights. Data silos hinder collaborative communication for aligning programs with business goals.

challenges.title: Billing integration issues
challenges.desc: As a billing platform, Orb must integrate usage-based systems with CRM, but inconsistencies arise during scaling. This causes delays in revenue workflows and accurate monetization for AI products. Teams struggle to connect usage data to contracts seamlessly.

challenges.title: Competitive pressure
challenges.desc: With 247 active competitors, Orb needs to differentiate in the AI monetization space. This competition demands optimized sales processes to maintain market share. Internal teams face challenges in fostering data-informed strategies amid funding rounds.

challenges.title: Data management
challenges.desc: Orb's focus on revenue design means handling complex usage data for cloud providers. Inaccurate data tracking leads to revenue leaks during growth. Sales enablement programs must address this to ensure alignment with business objectives.

deliverables.title: Sales Enablement System
deliverables.desc: Builds an AI-driven platform to train and equip Orb's sales team, integrating with existing CRM for real-time insights on usage-based billing. This ensures seamless data flow and process optimization.

deliverables.title: Billing Workflow Engine
deliverables.desc: Creates a flexible infrastructure for managing usage-based billing, linking it to Orb's revenue design tools to automate finance workflows. It integrates with their current systems to reduce errors and speed up monetization.

deliverables.title: Data Analytics Hub
deliverables.desc: Develops a centralized hub for analyzing sales and billing data, helping Orb foster collaborative communication. It connects with their AI tools to provide actionable insights for business alignment.

deliverables.title: Growth Scaling Framework
deliverables.desc: Establishes a framework to optimize sales processes amid Series B scaling, incorporating AI for predictive modeling. This integrates with Orb's existing tech to address competitive pressures and enhance efficiency.

engagementSteps.title: Initial Assessment
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Conduct a deep review of Orb's sales and billing processes based on research data.

engagementSteps.title: System Development
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Design and build the AI infrastructure tailored to Orb's usage-based billing needs.

engagementSteps.title: Integration and Launch
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Integrate the new systems with Orb's tech stack and launch for full operation.

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It uses AI to optimize sales processes like training and data analysis for companies like Orb.

faqItems.question: How does this integrate with Orb's billing?
faqItems.answer: The infrastructure links directly with Orb's usage-based billing tools for seamless data flow.

faqItems.question: Is this customized for Series B startups?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it addresses scaling challenges specific to fast-growing companies like Orb in San Francisco.

faqItems.question: What tools are involved?
faqItems.answer: We use AI and CRM integrations based on Orb's needs.

faqItems.question: How long does implementation take?
faqItems.answer: Typically 3 months, as outlined in the engagement steps.

faqItems.question: Will this help with competition?
faqItems.answer: It optimizes processes to differentiate Orb among its 247 competitors.

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Manages CRM integration for Orb's sales enablement

stackItems.name: Stripe
stackItems.role: Handles payment and billing workflows in Orb's infrastructure

stackItems.name: HubSpot
stackItems.role: Supports marketing and sales data analysis for Orb's growth

stackItems.name: OpenAI
stackItems.role: Powers AI-driven insights for Orb's revenue design processes

stackItems.name: Google Analytics
stackItems.role: Tracks user data and performance metrics for Orb's platforms
